framework.name: The Dog That Didn't Bark Confirmed
framework.description: Even this practitioner-focused article — which cites real incidents — has ZERO multi-agent delegation failures. Every failure is single-agent: bad RAG, broken connectors, compounding steps within one agent. Multi-hop delegation isn't failing in production because nobody is doing it.

source.title: Why AI Agents Fail in Production - by Paolo Perrone - Substack
